LLM reasoning and prompt orchestration module for the AI Research Assistant.  This component constructs structured prompts by combining user queries with retrieved document chunks, enabling context-aware reasoning using large language models.  It enforces citation grounding, ensuring that generated responses are supported by source documents. The modular design separates prompt construction from model execution, allowing flexibility in choosing different LLM providers.  This layer transforms retrieved information into coherent, explainable, and research-grade outputs.
